zh.Apethorpe with Woodnewton, Northamptonsh: 英國諾薩普頓史爾阿培索普 煙雨 武德紐頓
zh.Lathom, Ormskirk, Lancashire, UK: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉堂姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Dalton jr於1334年出生在英國藍卡爾比斯法姆時，他的父親Sir John Dalton sr30歲，母親Alice de Hussey16歲。他於大約1360年與Dalton在英國藍卡爾比斯法姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1389年在英國威爾斯享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Dalton jr于1334年出生在英国藍卡爾比斯法姆时，他的父亲Sir John Dalton sr30岁，母亲Alice de Hussey16岁。他于大约1360年与Dalton在英国藍卡爾比斯法姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1389年在英国威尔斯享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Dalton jr was born in 1334, in Bispham, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Dalton sr, was 30 and his mother, Alice de Hussey, was 16. He married Dalton about 1360, in Bispham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1389, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Dalton jr est né en 1334, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dalton sr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hussey, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Dalton environ 1360, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1389, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Dalton jr 1334 in Bispham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dalton sr 30 und seine Mutter Alice de Hussey 16. Er hat um 1360 in Bispham, Lancashire, England Dalton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dalton jr è nato il nel 1334 nel Bispham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Dalton sr, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Hussey, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Dalton circa 1360, nel Bispham, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1389, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Dalton jr(이)가 1334년 영국 랭카실르 비스프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dalton sr(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Hussey(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 랭카실르 비스프아에서 Dalton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1389년 영국 웨일스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dalton jr nasceu em 1334, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dalton sr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Hussey, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Dalton aproximadamente 1360, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1389, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Dalton jr родился в 1334 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Dalton sr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hussey, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Dalton около 1360 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1389 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Dalton jr nació en 1334, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dalton sr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice de Hussey, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Dalton aproximadamente 1360, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1389, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
